mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('DC', #{ymd}, LPAD(IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(check_no, 11) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 4, '0')) FROM daily_check_log WHERE check_no LIKE CONCAT('DC', #{ymd}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_check_log ( check_no, check_date, checklist_id, site_cd, writer_id, status_cd, weather_cd, remark, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{checkNo}, #{checkDate}, #{checklistId}, #{siteCd}, #{writerId}, #{statusCd}, #{weatherCd}, #{remark}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO daily_check_log_item ( check_id, item_id, item_name, input_type, required_yn, check_value, sort_ord ) VALUES ( #{checkId}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{inputType}, #{requiredYn}, #{checkValue}, #{sortOrd} )
